name: Ethidium Bromide
plain_summary: DNA intercalator dye (historical gel stain); orange fluorescence teaching example — handle as hazardous.

abs.plain_caption: Visible band near ~480 nm in water (DNA binding shifts optical properties).
abs.lit: Teaching multi-Gaussian for ethidium bromide aqueous absorption (~480 nm visible band). Hazardous intercalator — teaching only.
